subcodes.first_line: O Lord! These two leaves have sprung forth from the Tree of Thy mercy and have been stirred by the fragrant breeze wafting from the Valley of Thy knowledge [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای رب هاتان الورقهان انبتتا من سدره رحمتک و تحرکتا من نسیم عبق من وادی معرفتک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
